title: Santarém Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Santarém with a Z-Score of +3.43. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave has resulted in a Critical Level alert, with 0.0 HDD and 11.0 CDD. 
 The relative humidity is at 74% and wind speed is 10.3 km/h. 
 The conditions are expected to continue, posing a significant threat to the city's infrastructure and residents.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
